name: Josh Gottheimer
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $6,745,156 for Josh Gottheimer in U.S. House, NJ-05. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
